rulings.Case Title: TESHOME T TAREKEGN, VS. FREWWORK ABERRA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 12, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT ASNAKECH BELEW's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: Continued to September 11, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than August 15, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than August 15, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 858-868 BROADWAY LLC VS. KWONG CHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 12, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANTS YEE HO CHAN and KWONG CHAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: GRANTED, subject to (1) opposition; (2) posting of $8,288.37 no later than August 12, 2014 by 4 p.m.; and (3) filing answers no later than August 12, 2014 by 4 p.m. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA JURADO VS. NEIL MARTINSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 12, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT NEIL MARTINSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Sustained pursuant to CCP 430.10(c). CUD-14-649001 is abated pending resolution of CUD-13-646926. Parties may file a motion to consolidate actions. (501/REQ)
